title: 03 sky peel catches the car
prompt: Use case: compositing. Asset type: cinematic storyboard action frame. Image 1 controls Tina's identity, product, neighborhood, and the translucent sky-peel material. Image 2 supplies only the wide exterior idea of the car opening around seated Tina. Reject its orange gummy upholstery, completed rainbow parachute, empty sky, and flying pose. From a passenger-side exterior tracking view, show the long peeled ribbon of sky sweeping down in the wind and catching the roof seam of the moving car. The blue-gray roof and upper side skin peel backward with it in two continuous flexible layers. Tina stays seated in the intact black frame holding the gummy and bag. The street remains below; this is the instant before lift. Smooth material continuity, no debris or crash.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Create one frame from a coherent live-action Peelerz commercial sequence. Maintain Tina as the same young woman with long brown hair, blue jacket, black top, pink lychee gummy, and pink Peelerz package. Photoreal cinematic advertising with tactile real-world materials. The sky behaves as one peelable atmospheric membrane. Elegant, buoyant, and benign; no generic rainbow, candyland, explosion, disaster, captions, panel borders, watermarks, or extra characters.
